roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S ADD TO CAL MOTN MODIFY PROBATION TO COMMENCE SWAP 032519 -- FILED
DA'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE W/18010363 FILEDDA'S MOITON TO AMEND COMPLAINT FILED

/CAL:PD MOTION TO MODIFY PROBATION/CTORD:THE NEW SWAP SURRENDER DATE IS 03-25-19/CTORD: THE DEFENDANT WILL BE ABLE TO LEAVE THE STATE TO VISIT FAMILY IN HAWAII WITH A PRIOR NOTIFICATION TO APD WELL BEFOREHAND/

/JAVS/TWS/CH2:ISS:PROB 4 Y:PJ20D/CTS:1/SWAPD:2-25-19/X: THE DEFENDANT SHALL PAY A BASE FINE OF $390 PLUS $1,131 IN ASSESSMENTS FOR A FINE AMOUNT OF $1,521,/VF2:150/DDP2/LVAL/LCHEM/IID:1/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/EMAT/COLLECT/COMUN:10/DEF:SHALL COMPLETE 20 AA SESSIONS/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBERPRU 101 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DISM3/4019HALF/ADPRS1:JULY 7, 2018 IN THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/X:COURT NOTES UPON SUCCESSFUL COMPLETION OFSWAP, AA SESSIONS, COMMUNITY SERVICE, AND ABIDE BY THE IID, MATTER MAY BECONVERTED TO COURT PROBATION,/X:COURT FURTHER NOTES PARTIES STIPULATE TO HAVE ELECTRONIC MONITORING AND SCRAM DEVICE REMOVED,/
/CAL:DA MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE AND AMEND/X:MOTION TO AMEND GRANTED/X:FILING OF AMENDED COMPLAINT TO BE FILED AT NEXT HEARING/CONTD:RULING ON MOTIONTO CONSOLIDATE/SB:2 HR/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/GTWM/987,2/X: MVARS PROTECTIVE ORDER IS FILED AND SERVED/X: DA'S REQUEST FOR SCRAM IS GRANTED/OR//X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL  MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH GPS AND SCRAM DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD,/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVEBY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PROOF OF SCRAM/DOP/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DEF: APPEARANCE WAIVED UNLESS DISPO OR NEGATIVE SCRAM REPORT/
/CAL:DISPOSITON/JAVS/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OFNL/DEFT ADV NL: 2/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
/CAL: PRE-TRIAL CONFERENCE/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 21/TRANS 21:FORTHWITH FOR DISPO/
/CAL:PROOF OF SCARM/X:PROOF OF SCRAM PROVIDED,/GTWM/VD:PTC DATE OF 03-06-19/X:DOP IF DISPO/CONTD:PRETRIAL/
